intent_score.rationale: The output perfectly fulfills all requirements of the task brief while adhering to the design brief's pillars. It implements exactly six platforms, two checkpoints, and four ember pickups totaling 8 units as requested. The level design (vertical descent, lethal floor below exit, and tier-3 difficulty) is defensible against the design brief's description of the Fault Lines region and the 'Cheap Death' pillar.
